s1.ptxt: For M/T model, place gear shift lever in “Neutral” andapply parking brake.
For CVT model, place select lever in “P” and applyparking brake.
Warm up engine to normal operating temperature.
While listening to sound of injector (2) using sound scope (1) or the like, increase engine speed to higher than 3,000 rpm.
Check that injector operation sound stops when throttle valve is closed instantly and it resumes when engine speed is reduced to 1,500 rpm.
